---
title: "Intertemporal Choice & Labor — Track Map"
---

Forward-looking decisions about consumption, work, and investment. The
two-period model is the shared foundation; click a node to jump there.

```{mermaid}
graph LR
  TP[Two-Period Consumption] --> LL[Labor-Leisure Choice]
  TP --> TQ[Investment & Tobin's q]
  click TP "../content/two_period_consumption.html"
  click LL "../content/labor_leisure_model.html"
  click TQ "../content/tobin_q_model.html"
```

## Suggested path

1. [The Two-Period Consumption Model](../content/two_period_consumption.qmd) — splitting lifetime resources between today and tomorrow; the Euler equation and the role of the interest rate.
2. [The Labor–Leisure Choice](../content/labor_leisure_model.qmd) — trading consumption against time given the real wage; income vs. substitution effects.
3. [Investment and Tobin's q](../content/tobin_q_model.qmd) — when the market value of capital justifies new investment.
